title: Nunnezharia formosa
taxonomy: Nunnezharia formosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is native to South America. The exact classification of this plant may vary depending on the source. However, it is generally classified as a perennial shrub. Further research may be needed to determine its full classification.
